creator: josh.carroll@gmail.com
text:
It looks like the upstream source owners of vim-7.2.tar.bz2 have
updated the tarball but kept the same file name. Every mirror I have
tried has the same "wrong" file, so either they rebuilt the tarball
for some reason and kept the same name, or (and this is very, very
unlikely) they were compromised and this tarball was pushed onto their
main server and sent to all its mirrors.

I'm guessing it's just a case where they updated the file (I don't
know why they'd do that, pretty sloppy in my opinion). But perhaps
someone can confirm with the vim folks before we blindly accept the
new tarball?

Josh
